properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You said if we believe The greater things would come So pour Your Spirit out Like a river, like a flood Deliver every heart Body, soul, and mind All the darkness bows Before the feet of Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Healer's in this place The Healer's in this place Jesus, You are moving in our praise There's freedom in Your name There is freedom in Your name Jesus, You are Healer in this place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You said if we believe We would see Your kingdom come So pour Your spirit out Come and let Your will be done You've defeated death You remain our living hope We believe Your Word You're the God of miracles

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Healer's in this place The Healer's in this place Jesus, You are moving in our praise There's freedom in Your name There's freedom in Your name Jesus, You are Healer in this place

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are (You are here, Lord) You are (all the brokenness in me, God)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let the blind see all Your glory Let the dead rise testifying There is power in the mighty name of Jesus Let the mourning turn to dancing Fear is silenced in our praising There is power in the mighty name of Jesus C'mon

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let the blind see all Your glory Let the dead rise testifying There is power in the mighty name of Jesus Let the mourning turn to dancing Fear is silenced in our praising There is power in the mighty name of Jesus (there is power) There is power in the mighty name of Jesus

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The Healer's in this place The Healer's in this place Jesus, You are moving in our praise There's freedom in Your name There's freedom in Your name Jesus, You are Healer in this place (Let the blind see)

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Let the blind see all Your glory Let the dead rise testifying There is power in the mighty name of Jesus Let the mourning turn to dancing Fear is silenced in our praising There is power in the mighty name of Jesus

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: There is power in the mighty name of Jesus (there is power) There is power in the mighty name of Jesus (wonder working power) There is power in the mighty name of Jesus Jesus
